creator: horia@racoviceanu.com
text:
Fix: - Change all `rm -Rf` and `rm -R` to `rmdir` in pkg-plist to avoid destroying any user data during package upgrades.

measured plist-ok in tinderbox and portupgrades on a working system preserved data.

Build log:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20131114045333-10834/

Patch attached with submission follows:
